verses.text: Make no idols; keep My sabbaths and reverence My sanctuary. No idols. Worship God alone.
Make no idols; keep My sabbaths and reverence My sanctuary. No idols. Worship God alone.
If they obey, God gives rain, harvest, and plenty. Blessing. Obedience brings abundance.
If they obey, God gives rain, harvest, and plenty. Blessing. Obedience brings abundance.
If they obey, God gives rain, harvest, and plenty. Blessing. Obedience brings abundance.
He gives peace, and they shall chase their enemies. Peace. The faithful are kept safe.
He gives peace, and they shall chase their enemies. Peace. The faithful are kept safe.
He gives peace, and they shall chase their enemies. Peace. The faithful are kept safe.
God will dwell among them and walk with them as His people. Presence. The greatest blessing is God Himself.
God will dwell among them and walk with them as His people. Presence. The greatest blessing is God Himself.
God will dwell among them and walk with them as His people. Presence. The greatest blessing is God Himself.
God will dwell among them and walk with them as His people. Presence. The greatest blessing is God Himself.
God will dwell among them and walk with them as His people. Presence. The greatest blessing is God Himself.
If they disobey, terror, sickness, and defeat come. Warning. Sin brings trouble.
If they disobey, terror, sickness, and defeat come. Warning. Sin brings trouble.
If they disobey, terror, sickness, and defeat come. Warning. Sin brings trouble.
If they disobey, terror, sickness, and defeat come. Warning. Sin brings trouble.
If still rebellious, He breaks their pride and strength. Sevenfold. Discipline increases.
If still rebellious, He breaks their pride and strength. Sevenfold. Discipline increases.
If still rebellious, He breaks their pride and strength. Sevenfold. Discipline increases.
Wild beasts will rob them of their children. Beasts. Judgment grows fiercer.
Wild beasts will rob them of their children. Beasts. Judgment grows fiercer.
The sword, pestilence, and famine will come. Famine. Bread fails the rebellious.
The sword, pestilence, and famine will come. Famine. Bread fails the rebellious.
The sword, pestilence, and famine will come. Famine. Bread fails the rebellious.
The sword, pestilence, and famine will come. Famine. Bread fails the rebellious.
In fury He will chastise them sevenfold, even to eating their children. Horror. Persistent sin reaps dreadful woe.
In fury He will chastise them sevenfold, even to eating their children. Horror. Persistent sin reaps dreadful woe.
In fury He will chastise them sevenfold, even to eating their children. Horror. Persistent sin reaps dreadful woe.
In fury He will chastise them sevenfold, even to eating their children. Horror. Persistent sin reaps dreadful woe.
He will lay their cities waste and scatter them among the heathen. Scattered. Exile is the end of rebellion.
He will lay their cities waste and scatter them among the heathen. Scattered. Exile is the end of rebellion.
He will lay their cities waste and scatter them among the heathen. Scattered. Exile is the end of rebellion.
Then the land enjoys her sabbaths, long denied. The land rests. God's order is kept even in judgment.
Then the land enjoys her sabbaths, long denied. The land rests. God's order is kept even in judgment.
The survivors pine away in their enemies' lands. Pining. Guilt wastes the exiles.
The survivors pine away in their enemies' lands. Pining. Guilt wastes the exiles.
The survivors pine away in their enemies' lands. Pining. Guilt wastes the exiles.
The survivors pine away in their enemies' lands. Pining. Guilt wastes the exiles.
If they confess their sin, God remembers His covenant. Confession. Mercy waits for the penitent.
If they confess their sin, God remembers His covenant. Confession. Mercy waits for the penitent.
If they confess their sin, God remembers His covenant. Confession. Mercy waits for the penitent.
Yet He will not utterly cast them off, for His covenant's sake. Not cast off. Grace outlasts judgment.
Yet He will not utterly cast them off, for His covenant's sake. Not cast off. Grace outlasts judgment.
Yet He will not utterly cast them off, for His covenant's sake. Not cast off. Grace outlasts judgment.
Yet He will not utterly cast them off, for His covenant's sake. Not cast off. Grace outlasts judgment.
